{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {

    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,

  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the load-bearing concept (the router's function), shows where the draft drifts from it (misdescription of ablation in §3.3), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast (suggested rewrite of §3.3).",
    "R1.2": "Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (critical issues 1-7), proposes minimal repairs (suggested rewrite of §3.3).",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (issue #1).",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (scope creep in the final paragraph).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original, but misses issue #1).",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not (non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason)."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 1,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the load-bearing concept (the router's function), shows where the draft drifts from it (misdescription of ablation in §3.3), and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast (suggested rewrite of §3.3).
rationale.R1.2: Walks the chain end-to-end, flags every load-bearing inconsistency (critical issues 1-7), proposes minimal repairs (suggested rewrite of §3.3).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (issue #1).
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (scope creep in the final paragraph).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (no regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original, but misses issue #1).
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not (non-cosmetic changes are not annotated with source and reason).
